definition:
1. the office, dignity , or post of general, command , (Herdotus Historicus), attic; of naval command, (Xenophon Historicus) 
2. the office of  στρατηγός at Athens, a sort of war-minister , (Aristophanes Comicus):—;at Rome the Praetorship , (Plutarch) 
3. a period of command, campaign , (Xenophon Historicus) 
4. the qualities  or skill of a general, generalship , (Xenophon Historicus) (ML)
